name: My Tuna Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the flat noodles according to package instructions.
2. In a separate bowl, combine 2 cans tuna in water, 2 cans cream of mushroom soup, 2 cans milk (soup cans), and 2 cans mushrooms.
3. Mix the cooked noodles with the soup mixture until well combined.
4. Transfer the mixture into a large casserole dish.
5. Top the casserole with the chow mein noodles.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 10 minutes, or serve hot if not baking.
